title: Tapping to Trust Legacy Property Building
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing the belief that large-scale property investment is out of reach
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 72 of a 12-week money programme. The script targets the doubt that property ownership or large-scale wealth creation is too big a reach, and moves toward a settled confidence in building assets that outlast you.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 72 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when property investment or building tangible long-term assets feels too large or too complicated to be within reach.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 72 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the belief that property ownership at a meaningful scale is too complex or too out of reach, and moves toward a confident trust in building assets that outlast you and pass down something solid.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though property investing once felt out of reach, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I doubted I could own multiple valuable properties, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though big deals once felt scary, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I picture estates, rentals, and land.
Side of eye: Homes for family and for income.
Under eye: Wealth that lasts beyond me.
Under nose: I feel excited to build it.
Chin: I trust my knowledge and advisors.
Collarbone: I'm ready to expand property holdings.
Under arm: I feel calm about big investments.
Top of head: I welcome properties that grow our legacy.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I am a confident, wise property owner.
Side of eye: I attract profitable, beautiful homes and land.
Under eye: I build assets that outlive me.
Under nose: I enjoy adding value and creating income.
Chin: I trust each step of the process.
Collarbone: I celebrate building a strong property legacy.
Under arm: I love providing for generations through real estate.
Top of head: I grow lasting wealth through property with ease.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 72 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
